---
title: "Qingyin Cai"
image: portrait/headshot_1.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: rectangle
  image-width: 18em
  links: 
    -   text: Email
        icon: envelope
        href: mailto:cai00154@umn.edu
    -   text: Twitter
        icon: twitter
        href: "https://x.com/QingyinCai"      
comments: false
---
::: {.column-body-outset}

<span style="margin-top: -120px; display: block;">Welcome to my website!

<p style="margin-bottom: 40px;">I'm a PhD candidate in the [Department of Applied Economics](https://apec.umn.edu/) at the University of Minnesota. My fields of interest include agricultural economics, consumer economics, and environmental economics.

<p style="margin-bottom: 40px;">My current research addresses recent challenges in food and agricultural markets, focusing on the impact of climate change on agrifood systems and the effects of food price inflation on retail landscapes and consumer welfare.

<p style="margin-bottom: 40px;">**I will be on the job market in the 2024-2025 academic year.**

<p style="margin-bottom: 40px;">Here is my most up-to-date version [CV](cv_2024_june.pdf).

Contact: <cai00154@umn.edu>
